taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, General Software Engineer
must_have_quals: BS or MS in Computer Science or equivalent engineering degree with 3+ years of experience working on enterprise software in distributed environment, 1+ years working with data processing systems, Strong proficiency in Java or Scala, Solid expertise in SQL (MySQL, Snowflake) and experience with at least one NoSQL store (preference: Mongo, Redis), Experience working with streaming technologies like Kafka, Experience with CI/CD related technologies, including Docker, K8s, Terraform, Expertise designing and building micro services and RESTful APIs, Working knowledge of public cloud technologies (Azure, AWS), Working knowledge of data privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) and secure data handling, Ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly to technical and non-technical audiences
preferred_quals: Experience with Spark, Databricks, Airflow, Practical experience of tuning Spark jobs, Experience building agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, vector DBs, MCP)
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, test, deploy, and monitor micro‑services that deliver critical product features end‑to‑end, Architect solutions that span multiple services and teams, ensuring cohesive behavior and scalability, Drive every phase of software delivery: design, implementation, reviews, automated testing (unit/integration/e2e), refactoring, debugging, and documentation, Partner with multi-functional teams to guarantee on‑time delivery of high‑quality, production‑ready product, Experiment with emergent technologies in a fast‑paced environment and promote takeaways across the team, Fast prototyping to explore solutions for new and emerging problems, Design and implement comprehensive test suites covering happy paths, functional flows, error states, user journeys, and edge cases, Architect and build comprehensive monitoring and alerting to detect anomalies, saturation, and regressions in real time, Ensure services are highly available, horizontally scalable, and tuned for high throughput/low latency while optimizing for cost efficiency, Embed secure‑by‑design practices around PII handling, role‑based/attribute‑based access control, and audit trails for agent actions
job_summary: Adobe is a leading company that empowers everyone to create through innovative platforms and tools. The Software Development Engineer will design, develop, test, deploy, and monitor micro-services that deliver critical product features, ensuring scalability and cohesive behavior across services.
